info.name: Portfolio Prime API
info.description:
Test-ready Postman collection for the current Portfolio Prime backend.

Import together with the matching environment file.

Environment variables used by this collection:
- rootUrl: server origin
- baseUrl: unversioned API base (/api)
- v1BaseUrl: versioned API base (/api/v1)
- profileId, projectId, projectIdentifier, resumeId, contactId, magazineId
- uploadedImagePublicId, uploadedImagePublicIdEncoded, uploadedImageUrl, uploadFilePath

Backend runtime env vars required for the API itself:
- MONGO_URL
- PORT
- CORS_ORIGIN
- CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME
- CLOUDINARY_API_KEY
- CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET
- CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_FOLDER (optional)

Notes:
- Resource routes are available under both /api and /api/v1.
- Upload requires multipart/form-data with field name image.
- Contact POST validates name, email, subject, and message.
- Magazine currently supports GET and POST only.
